content.en:
Drop after drop of immeasurable blood spirit liquid was consumed by Ye Tian, but he was getting closer and closer to the completion of the second full-body tempering.

Finally this day.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's second full-body refining was completely completed, his physical body began to transform, and his aura became stronger and stronger.

"The strength has soared!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

With his current strength, he was definitely not weaker than those fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms who had been tempered more than nine times throughout his body.

However, it is still far from the fifth stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

However, with his current strength and many life-saving means, he encountered a weaker fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, at least he had a glimmer of hope of escaping.

"It's a pity that there is not much time left, and there is no way to continue to break through!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, just by obtaining these immeasurable blood spiritual liquids and advancing the cultivation to the second full-body refinement, this is a great opportunity.

The day of departure is getting closer and closer, but Ye Tian has finally collected 10,000 contribution points.

After that, he did not continue his activities, but completely hid himself from being discovered and thus killed.

Time passed, and on this day, the Great Ancestors stopped acting.

"It's time!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian seemed to see a hand stretched out from the depths of endless time and space, reaching into the Evil Blue Land, no matter where these Great Ancestors were, they would be discovered by Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor and taken away.

Swish!

Ye Tian's body was brushed by a big hand, and the next moment he left the Evil Blue Land and returned to the previous hall.

However, Ye Tian's dark blue wolf copy body was not taken away.

Obviously, it is impossible for Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor to discover the identity of the Blue Wolf, and he can only locate it according to the token or other means, so that these Great Ancestors can be moved away from the Evil Blue Land.

......

"Seven Great Ancestors are missing!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But what surprised him was that one of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms did not fall, it should be very strong in concealment, maybe he didn't move all the time, and he was hidden the whole time.

Coupled with a certain amount of luck, the other party survived.

However, the other party will definitely not gain anything this time.

As for the other six who fell, it was the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and the six fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms fell all at once, and such a loss was very serious!

If such losses belong to the Xuanqi Territory, then the Xuanqi Territory will be severely damaged!

"What, there are two fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms that survived?"

Those fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms were shocked when they saw that Ye Tian and another fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform were still alive.

In total, there are only three fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and two of them have survived, which is a bit high!

"Hmph, you must be hiding, if it weren't for those fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms who didn't bother to look for you, the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, with your strength, you would definitely not be able to live!" a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform mocked.

Ye Tian said coldly: "But we survived, and if you are in the fourth stage of the high-level immeasurable life body realm, I am afraid that you will definitely die!"

"Little guy, you are looking for death! If it weren't for the territory of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, I would slap you to death!" the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform said angrily.

"Huh!"

After Ye Tian sneered, he ignored the other party.

At this moment, the phantom of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor descended.

"I've seen Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor!"

A high-level immeasurable lifeform said respectfully.

"If you don't have 10,000 contribution points, you can leave!"

As soon as the words fell, some of the treasures on the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms were forcibly captured by the Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor one by one.

Then, these fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms were removed.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian was a little surprised.

These fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms worked hard to find some resource treasures in the Evil Blue Land, but because they didn't have all the 10,000 contribution points, they were directly deprived by the Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor!!

As soon as he thought of this, he finally knew why six fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms had fallen!

After all, if they didn't get together 10,000 contribution points, they were afraid that they would go crazy or fight with other fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, just to make up 10,000 contribution points.

Once you don't get it together, then there is nothing, and you have to risk your life for nothing, which is a loss!

Therefore, the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms who entered the Evil Blue Land were all desperate for their contribution points, which led to the fall of several fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

If they hadn't contributed to the value, they wouldn't have fallen so much.

"Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor and they are using this method to make the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms desperate, if they don't do this, maybe these fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms will steadily find resources, and they won't even fight each other, they are all very harmonious, maybe the Evil Blue Land will not be dangerous!" Ye Tian guessed.

Perhaps it was really as other Great Ancestors said, Heavenly Ancestors like Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor used a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform as a chess piece, playing chess games in places like the Evil Blue Land.

It seems sad, but for the sake of resources, these fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms are still here!

In the blink of an eye, only the eighteen Great Ancestors were still in this hall.

Except for Ye Tian, the others were all fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

"What, this fourth-stage Great Ancestor is still here, he has collected 10,000 contribution points???

All the Great Ancestors were stunned and looked at Ye Tian in disbelief.

Even the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform who had just had a little conflict with Ye Tian was completely dumbfounded, he didn't believe that Ye Tian would be able to make up 10,000 contribution points!

If you want to make up 10,000 contribution points, you have to kill ten fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, which is impossible, that is, you have found rare resources worth 10,000 contribution points!

But if you're looking for resources, you'll inevitably encounter other fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and you'll be killed in a short time!

"Unless he has a terrifying hidden means and is not discovered by the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

These Great Ancestors speculated.

However, they are not allowed to think about it, because the next step is to exchange the contribution points for benefits.

However, all the resources they found from the Evil Blue Land had to be handed over, and they couldn't leave one piece on their bodies, otherwise they would all be discovered.

Ye Tian also handed over all the resources on his body, leaving not a single one.

However, he left some resources in his favor on the Blue Wolf, and those resources are still in the Evil Blue Land, so it is not cheating.

I saw that after Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor received these resources, he directly sacrificed a treasure booklet, allowing the Great Ancestors present to exchange benefits according to their own contribution points.
